ModMetaData.name: Diseases Framework
ModMetaData.author: Romazea, Blaxer Studios
ModMetaData.description:
The foundational library for biological challenges in RimWorld.
Developed by Blaxer Studios, this framework provides high-performance, modular tools for implementing complex disease transmission vectors. Our goal is to move beyond simple "random events" and create a truly interconnected biological ecosystem on the Rim.
### Features: - Food Contamination Vector: Universal system for meals, kibble, and rations. - Deep Persistence: Infection data persists through save cycles and stack splitting. - Hybrid Notifications: Configurable messages or urgent letters.
### For Modders: Check our GitHub repository for technical documentation and examples on how to implement your own contagious diseases using our custom components.
### For Players: This mod is a code library and does not add diseases on its own. It is a mandatory requirement for other mods that use this framework. Please place it at the top of your load order, right after Harmony.
